title: v0.3 UI 改造：今日任务执行台
behavior: 按 docs/design/page/pages/today-page.md 重做今日任务页首屏信息层级，把今日页定位为执行台：突出一个今日重点任务、今日状态、短 AI 建议和轻量复盘入口。

acceptance.text: 今日任务页第一张核心卡片是今日重点任务，展示任务标题、最低完成线、预计时长、推荐专注时段和注意事项
今日任务可能有多个，但首页只突出一个主任务；多任务时显示“今日共 N 个任务 · 查看全部”或等价轻量入口
今日状态卡展示当前能量、可用时间或当前状态，并提供管理入口；AI 今日建议保持短句，不出现大段解释
晚间复盘入口轻量展示；今日页不展示完整目标计划，不承担日历页职责
今日页继续通过 PlanBundle/DailyTaskView/TodaySuggestion 读取数据，不直接拼装底层 storage 结构

verify.feature: npm run test -- today today-suggestion review ui-components

outOfScope: 不新增完整今日全部任务页面，除非已有路由支持；可先用轻量入口或抽屉占位
不把塔罗、MBTI、每日关键词作为任务决策依据

userPath: 有今日多个任务 -> 打开今日页 -> 首屏突出一个重点任务并显示查看全部入口
今日无任务或无目标 -> 打开今日页 -> 显示明确低压力空状态和创建目标入口
点击晚间复盘入口 -> 可进入复盘页，原复盘保存路径仍可用
integrationEvidence: tests/today.test.ts 覆盖今日页源码结构和数据读取路径
tests/today-suggestion.test.ts 覆盖 TodaySuggestionView 仍可从 PlanBundle/DailyTaskView 生成
tests/review.test.ts 保持复盘入口和保存路径通过
npm.cmd run verify:system 通过，mp-weixin 构建产物生成成功

commands.command: npm.cmd run test -- today today-suggestion review ui-components
commands.notes: 30 tests passed across today, today-suggestion, review, and ui-components; coverage includes today page source structure, PlanBundle/TodaySuggestion read path, short suggestions, status fields, and review entry.
mp-weixin build completed successfully; Sass legacy API warnings only.
Harness gate passed first with F21 active (4 features: 1 passing, 1 active, 2 not_started) and then after F21 was marked passing (4 features: 2 passing, 2 not_started), with 0 warnings and 0 errors.

evidence.manualSmoke: Source/build smoke for F21: today page first shows TodayFocusCard with one focus task, minimum line, estimated minutes, recommended focus window, caution, and goal title; multiple tasks are behind a lightweight expandable entry; status card shows energy, available minutes, current state, and management entry; AI advice is limited to short tips; review entry navigates to review; no full goal plan or calendar page responsibility was added.
evidence.notes: F21 keeps data reads on migrateLegacyDailyPlans() + buildTodaySuggestionFromPlanBundle()/TodaySuggestionView. It extends TodaySuggestionView with availableMinutes, stateLabel, and suggestionTips only; it does not write Task.status, DailyReview, PlanBundle, storage keys, planner, replanner, AI, or tarot state.
